calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Gebala, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Petitioner that notice to the minor children is waived. The court advises of its intent to grant the petition as prayed.

The Petition for Spousal Property is granted, and the order is executed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Yang. Not Reported.
